case_title: GEE, DENNIS VS HUI, HERRITO(CALIFORNIA WATCH REPAIR)

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PLFT TO PAY $135,BY CREDIT CARD ON 5/22/98 & DEFT TO GIVE ANTIQUE HOTEL CLOCK IN EXCHANGE. IF DEFT FAILS TO RETURN CLOCK PLFT WILL HAVE A JUDGMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUI, HERRITO(CALIFORNIA WATCH REPAIR) PLAINTIFF'S DENNIS GEE'S MOTION FOR COSTS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MAILED DEF'S CLAIMFORM TO PLTFF.PER HIS WRITTEN REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HUI, HERRITO(CALIFORNIA WATCH REPAIR) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GEE, DENNIS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO DENNIS GEE RETURNED SIGNED.
CERTFD.MAIL TO HERRITO HUI-CALIFORNIA WATCH REPAIR RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY GEE, DENNIS AS TO DEFENDANT HUI, HERRITO(CALIFORNIA WATCH REPAIR) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
FOR $1500. AND COSTS AGAINST DEFT. IF PLFT RECEIVES THE CLOCK HE MUST DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CON'T FOR DISPOSITION ONLY.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,995.00 FILED BY HUI, HERRITO(CALIFORNIA WATCH REPAIR) AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GEE, DENNIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-21-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-10-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
